headline: Efficiency techniques led the month as quantization and Rectified Flow broke out alongside a leading content moderation tooling shift.
body: Quantization and Rectified Flow both registered breakouts this window, while zero-trust and content moderation held leading positions and long-context and system architecture kept improving. On the model front, Z.ai released GLM-5.2, a 753B parameter open weights LLM with a 1 million token context window that ranks first on the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index. Talent movement was sharp: Noam Shazeer joined OpenAI and Meta's head of product for its 'AI for work' transformation departed. A cluster of new entrants centered on browser sandboxing, including sandboxed iframe, same-origin policy, srcdoc, and the sandbox attribute, signals rising attention to execution isolation.

cited_items.title: GLM-5.2 is probably the most powerful text-only open weights LLM
Meta head of product for 'AI for work' transformation is leaving company
